description: Single source of truth for the Adipoli German cinematic arc generation pipeline. Read by scripts/render-arc.py. Do NOT hand-edit prompt fields without also updating the rendered SERIES_FULL_SCRIPT.md (or regenerate it from this manifest).

globals.style_block: Pixar-style 3D animation. Warm cinematic lighting, soft ambient occlusion, rich saturated colors. Clean render, expressive character animation. Premium animated-film quality.
globals.character_block: The young Malayali man from the reference images: early 20s, warm expressive face, medium-brown skin, black hair clean and simple, no beard, no glasses, wearing a casual white cotton shirt and jeans.
globals.negative_prompt: No text overlays. No subtitles. No watermark. No hat. No glasses. No beard. No realistic style. No live action. No anime.

videos.title: First German Words
videos.narrative: The morning after the spark. First real contact with the language. Starts on the Kerala veranda, then moves to a bus ride, a tea shop, and home at night. The full first day of learning.

scenes.title: Veranda Morning — Opening the Book
scenes.still_prompt: Medium-wide establishing shot. A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting on the steps of a Kerala home veranda in warm golden morning light. Lush green garden with palm trees and tropical plants in soft focus behind him. A brand new German language textbook open on his lap, a notebook and pen beside him on the stone step, a steel cup of chai. His expression is focused and quietly excited — day one. White cotton shirt, jeans, bare feet on the warm stone. Dappled morning sunlight through overhead leaves.
scenes.animation_prompt: Gentle breath, fingers carefully turning the first page of the textbook, slight forward lean of curiosity. Dappled sunlight shifts through the leaves above. Faint garden sounds. A tiny breeze moves a plant leaf in the background.

scenes.title: Detail Insert — Fingers on the Page
scenes.animation_prompt: Camera pushes in slowly toward the open textbook on his lap. Close-up of his fingers tracing the German alphabet letters on the page. Small careful finger movement along the text. Dappled sunlight on the page. Intimate detail shot.

scenes.title: Trying the First Word
scenes.still_prompt: Medium close-up. A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting on Kerala home veranda steps, morning light, green garden behind him in soft focus. He is looking down at the open German textbook on his lap, lips slightly parted as if about to speak a word. His expression is concentrated and slightly self-conscious. White cotton shirt. Warm natural lighting on his face from the side.
scenes.animation_prompt: Lips part slowly, forming the word Hallo — careful, deliberate pronunciation. Slight self-conscious head tilt. Eyes flick down to the book then back up. A tiny breath of effort. The look of someone hearing their own voice say something foreign for the first time.

scenes.title: Writing — Pen on Paper
scenes.animation_prompt: He looks down and picks up his pen. Camera follows his hand as he begins writing carefully in the notebook on the veranda step. Small precise pen strokes forming German letters. Warm morning light on the page. Focused, quiet moment.

scenes.title: Something Clicked
scenes.still_prompt: Medium shot. A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting on Kerala home veranda steps, morning light. He has just looked up from his notebook, expression shifting from concentration to a small quiet realisation — something just clicked. The German textbook and notebook rest on his lap and the step beside him. Green garden and palm trees in soft focus behind. White cotton shirt. Morning light catches the side of his face. The faintest hint of a smile.
scenes.animation_prompt: A gentle exhale. The faintest smile forms at the corner of his mouth. Eyes drift to the garden, then back. Small nod to himself. The morning light catches his face. The posture of someone who just understood something new.

scenes.title: Quiet Pride in the Garden
scenes.still_prompt: Medium-wide shot. A young Malayali man in his early 20s standing at the edge of a Kerala home garden, leaning against a veranda post. He holds the closed notebook loosely in one hand. Green palm trees and tropical plants surround him. His expression is calm and quietly proud — he just did something real. White cotton shirt, morning light filtering through the trees. Cinematic composition with depth.
scenes.animation_prompt: Slow steady breath. Gentle breeze moves leaves around him. His gaze drifts across the Kerala morning garden. A small private smile forms. Tiny head lift — the posture of someone who feels a little taller than yesterday.

scenes.title: On the Bus — Reading
scenes.animation_prompt: Gentle bus vibration, his eyes scanning the phone screen, tiny scroll movements, slight sway with the bus movement. Kerala countryside sliding past the window in soft focus.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting by the window of a Kerala public bus, afternoon light streaming in. He holds his phone, scrolling through a German learning app lesson. Earphones in one ear. Other passengers softly blurred. The Kerala landscape slides by outside the window. White cotton shirt. His backpack on the seat beside him.

scenes.title: Bus — Mouthing Words
scenes.animation_prompt: He mouths a German word silently to himself on the bus, looking down at his phone screen. Tiny lip movement, slight self-conscious glance around to check nobody noticed. Returns to reading.

scenes.title: Tea Shop — Practicing
scenes.animation_prompt: Small pen movements writing in the notebook. Tiny sip of chai. Focused, present. The quiet contentment of studying in a new place.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting at a small Kerala tea shop, a simple wooden bench and table. Steel glass of chai, the German textbook open in front of him, notebook beside it. He is writing in the notebook. Afternoon light, other customers in soft blur behind. A street and autorickshaw softly visible outside. White cotton shirt.

scenes.title: Walking Home — Muttering Words
scenes.animation_prompt: Steady walking pace. Lips moving slightly, practicing pronunciation. Tiny smile when a word comes out right. Gentle arm swing. Golden light on his face.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s walking on a quiet Kerala residential lane in late afternoon golden light. Phone in one hand, earphone in one ear — listening to German audio. His lips are moving slightly — he is muttering German words to himself as he walks. Palm trees and Kerala houses in the background. White cotton shirt. Warm golden hour light.

scenes.title: Home — Showing the Parents
scenes.animation_prompt: Animated hand gestures pointing at the textbook. Excited expression, speaking enthusiastically. Small head nods. The energy of someone who found something they love.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting in a Kerala home living room, holding the German textbook open and showing it to someone just off-camera. His expression is animated and excited, explaining something. Warm indoor lighting, a traditional Kerala living room with wooden furniture. White cotton shirt.

scenes.title: Night — Lying in Bed with the Book
scenes.animation_prompt: Slow calm breath. Tiny smile. Eyes drift from the ceiling to the book on his chest. One hand gently touches the book cover. The lamp light flickers softly.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s lying on his bed in a Kerala bedroom at night, single warm lamp on. His phone rests on his chest, screen showing a German lesson app. The notebook and pen on the bedside. He stares at the ceiling with a faint smile — the satisfied look of someone who had a good first day. The notebook and pen on the bedside. White t-shirt.

videos.title: The German Class
videos.narrative: First real classroom day at a Kerala German language institute. Nervous arrival, class scenes, tea break, library, auto-rickshaw ride, walking home energised. The full arc of a first day at school.

scenes.title: Arriving at the Institute
scenes.still_prompt: Medium close-up. A young Malayali man in his early 20s standing outside, morning light. He holds his phone checking directions on a map app. Small backpack on one shoulder. A simple building entrance softly blurred behind him. His expression is nervous but eager — first class day. White cotton shirt. No other people visible.
scenes.animation_prompt: Gentle breath, small weight shift, slight glance up at the building, tiny adjustment of the notebook in his hands.

scenes.title: Finding a Seat
scenes.still_prompt: Inside a small simple Kerala language classroom, plastic chairs, a whiteboard at the front. A young Malayali man in his early 20s is just sitting down at a desk near the middle. He places his phone and a notebook in front of him — the phone shows a German learning app. His expression is quietly nervous and observant. White cotton shirt.
scenes.animation_prompt: Small movement of sitting down, gentle breath, tiny head turn glancing at classmates, careful placement of notebook on desk.

scenes.title: Listening to the Teacher
scenes.still_prompt: Medium close-up inside a simple Kerala classroom. A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting at a wooden desk, leaning forward in concentration. His phone lies on the desk showing a German vocabulary app as reference. A whiteboard softly blurred in the background. No other people visible — tight framing. White cotton shirt. Warm natural light.
scenes.animation_prompt: Gentle breath, tiny eye movement following the teacher, small forward lean of concentration, occasional blink of focus.

scenes.title: Trying to Speak
scenes.still_prompt: Medium close-up inside a simple Kerala classroom. A young Malayali man in his early 20s at his desk, mouth slightly open as if forming a German word. His phone on the desk shows a German phrase. His expression shows effort and slight nervousness — trying to speak in class for the first time. No other people visible. White cotton shirt.
scenes.animation_prompt: Small mouth movement forming a German sentence, tiny breath, half-raised hand, slight blush of effort, gentle gaze toward the teacher in soft-focus background.

scenes.title: Walking Home
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s walking on a Kerala street in late afternoon golden light, away from a language institute. His phone is in one hand, earphones in — listening to the German lesson audio review. Small backpack on one shoulder. His expression is quietly energised. Other people and Kerala street life softly visible.
scenes.animation_prompt: Steady walking pace, gentle arm swing, tiny private smile, slight head lift of new confidence.

scenes.title: Tea Break in the Corridor
scenes.animation_prompt: Small sip of tea. Glancing at phone screen. Tiny scroll through vocabulary. The quiet multitasking of tea break + app revision.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s standing in a simple corridor outside a Kerala classroom, holding a small steel glass of tea in one hand and his phone in the other — checking a German vocabulary app between classes. He leans against the wall. White cotton shirt.

scenes.title: Library — Revising on the App
scenes.animation_prompt: Tiny finger movement tracing a word in the dictionary. Small writing movement in the notebook. Focused gaze. Quiet library atmosphere.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting at a wooden table in a small Kerala library. A tablet propped up on the table showing a German learning app with vocabulary flashcards. A notebook beside him where he writes down words. Warm natural light from a window. White cotton shirt. Focused expression.

scenes.title: Auto-Rickshaw — Reading Notes
scenes.animation_prompt: Gentle rickshaw vibration and sway. Eyes scanning the phone screen. Tiny scrolls. Kerala street life sliding past in soft focus. Tiny nod of understanding.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting in the back of a Kerala auto-rickshaw, afternoon light. He holds his phone, scrolling through a German vocab app. His notebook is in his bag the day's notes. The Kerala street is softly visible through the open sides of the auto. His expression is absorbed. White cotton shirt. Backpack beside him.

scenes.title: Auto-Rickshaw — Looking Up Smiling
scenes.animation_prompt: He looks up from his phone and out through the open side of the auto-rickshaw. A small genuine smile. The Kerala afternoon passes by. He puts the phone away — thinking about what he learned today.

scenes.title: Evening — App Review on Terrace
scenes.animation_prompt: Gentle page turn. Eyes scanning notes. Tiny smile of recall. Sunset light shifting slowly. Peaceful evening study.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting on the terrace of his Kerala home in the evening, orange sunset light. He holds his phone, scrolling through completed German lessons on a learning app. His expression is calm and satisfied — good progress today. Kerala rooftops and palm trees in background. White cotton shirt.

scenes.title: Night — Practicing with the App
scenes.animation_prompt: Tiny finger taps on the phone screen. Focused eyes. Small nod when getting an answer right. The engaged energy of app-based learning at night.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s lying on his bed in his Kerala bedroom at night, warm lamp. He holds his phone doing a German exercise on a learning app — tapping answers, focused. Earphones in. His expression is engaged, not tired. White t-shirt.

scenes.title: Next Morning — Walking to Class Confidently
scenes.animation_prompt: Confident walking pace with earphones in. Slight spring in his step. Morning light on his face. Learning even while commuting.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s walking on a Kerala street in the morning, heading toward the language institute. Phone in hand with earphones in — listening to a German audio lesson as he walks. Small backpack. His stride is more confident than yesterday. Morning light. White cotton shirt. Small smile.

videos.title: The Struggle
videos.narrative: Weeks have passed. The honeymoon is over. German grammar is hard. Kuttan is tired, frustrated, doubting himself. Multiple settings: bedroom at night, classroom confusion, bus staring, kitchen alone.

scenes.title: Late Night Study
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man sitting on the floor of his Kerala bedroom late at night, single lamp providing dim warm light. Around him: his phone showing a German learning app with a difficult grammar lesson, a notebook covered in messy handwritten notes, an empty cup. His eyes look tired, his posture slightly slumped. He stares at the phone screen with the look of someone who has been studying for hours. White cotton shirt slightly rumpled.
scenes.animation_prompt: Slow tired breath, tiny rub of one eye, slight head sway from fatigue, dim lamp flicker.

scenes.title: Frustrated
scenes.animation_prompt: Pen down. Both hands move partially into his hair. Head bows slightly. Small frustrated breath, tiny head shake, eyes close for a second.

scenes.title: Crossed-Out Page
scenes.animation_prompt: Camera drifts down to the notebook on the floor. Close-up of the page showing crossed-out German sentences. His hand rests on the edge of the page. Tiny hand movement, very faint breath, gentle lamp flicker.

scenes.title: Doubting at the Window
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man standing at the window of his Kerala bedroom, late at night. He looks out at the dark Kerala street and palm trees outside. His expression is quietly doubting, wondering if he can really do this. Dim lamp light from the room behind him casts a soft glow on his side. Faint reflection of his face in the window glass.
scenes.animation_prompt: Slow breath, tiny weight shift, gentle gaze out the window, faint reflection of his face moving slightly in the window glass.

scenes.title: Morning — Dragging Out of Bed
scenes.animation_prompt: Slow heavy breath. Hands rubbing face. Reluctant posture. The weight of having to get up and do it again.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting on the edge of his bed in a Kerala bedroom, early morning gray light. He looks exhausted, shoulders slumped. His phone lies on the bed showing a German app notification — a daily lesson reminder he does not want to open. White cotton shirt wrinkled from sleep.

scenes.title: Bus — Staring Blankly
scenes.animation_prompt: Blank stare out the window. No movement except gentle bus sway. Tired eyes. The look of someone going through the motions.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting on a Kerala bus, afternoon. He stares blankly out the window, his phone face-down on his lap, the German app abandoned. His expression is distant and tired. Kerala landscape passing outside. White cotton shirt. No energy.

scenes.title: Alone — App Exercise Failing
scenes.animation_prompt: Tiny frustrated tap on phone. Seeing wrong answer. Small head shake. Eyes closing briefly. The frustration of getting it wrong repeatedly.
scenes.still_prompt: Medium close-up. A young Malayali man in his early 20s on his bed at night, holding his phone. The screen shows a German exercise with wrong answers marked in red. His expression is frustrated — he keeps getting it wrong. Notebook with crossed-out attempts beside him. White cotton shirt. Lamp light.

scenes.title: Class — Putting the Pen Down
scenes.animation_prompt: He puts the pen down on the notebook. Leans back slightly in the chair. A small exhale of defeat. Eyes close for a second. The moment of wanting to give up in class.

scenes.title: Kitchen — Eating Alone at Night
scenes.animation_prompt: Slow mechanical eating. Tired gaze at nothing. The loneliness of struggling alone. Gentle kitchen sounds.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting alone at a small table in a Kerala home kitchen late at night. A plate of rice in front of him, barely touched. His phone lies face-down on the table — he has abandoned the German app for the night. Single overhead light. White cotton shirt.

scenes.title: Phone — Considering Quitting
scenes.animation_prompt: Tiny scroll movement on the phone. Conflicted expression. Small bite of the lip. Eyes that want to close. The weight of doubt.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s lying on his bed at night, phone held up above his face, screen glow lighting his features. His expression is conflicted — considering whether to keep going. The German textbook lies discarded at the foot of the bed. White t-shirt.

scenes.title: Rain — Standing at the Window
scenes.animation_prompt: Rain sounds. His breath fogs the glass slightly. Tiny head lean against the window frame. Watching the rain with heavy eyes. A moment of reckoning.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s standing at the window of his Kerala bedroom, watching monsoon rain fall outside. Heavy rain on palm trees and rooftops. His expression is melancholy but not broken — somewhere between giving up and holding on. Dim gray light. White cotton shirt.

scenes.title: Rain — A Decision Forming
scenes.animation_prompt: His jaw tightens slightly. A small breath in. He turns away from the window slowly. Not defeated, not energised — just deciding to try one more time. Quiet resolve.

videos.title: Breakthrough
videos.narrative: Something clicks. German starts making sense. Multiple settings: bedroom study, phone video, classroom confidence, helping others, peaceful night study.

scenes.title: Calmer Study
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man sitting on the floor of his Kerala bedroom in soft morning light. His phone shows a German learning app open to a grammar lesson. A notebook beside him is tidier than before. His expression is calmer, more present. He is reading the lesson carefully on his phone. White cotton shirt, freshly composed.
scenes.animation_prompt: Slow calm breath, tiny finger scrolling on the phone, gentle lift of a chai cup, focused gaze at the screen.

scenes.title: The Click
scenes.animation_prompt: Tiny intake of breath, small widening of the eyes, lips part slightly — the exact instant a German grammar pattern clicks while looking at the phone screen. Almost imperceptible lift at the corner of the mouth.

scenes.title: Speaking to the Mirror
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man standing in front of a small wall mirror in his Kerala bedroom, morning light. He is saying a German sentence to himself, mouth shaped mid-word, looking at his own reflection. His expression is focused and quietly proud — this one is coming out cleanly. White cotton shirt.
scenes.animation_prompt: Clear mouth movement forming a full German sentence, gentle breath, tiny nod of self-approval, small smile forming at the end.

scenes.title: Quiet Pride on the Terrace
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man standing on a small Kerala home terrace or balcony in the late morning. He has his notebook in one hand, looking out at the green Kerala surroundings. His expression is quietly proud — he can feel that something has shifted. There is calm in him now. White cotton shirt.
scenes.animation_prompt: Slow steady breath, tiny lift of the chin, gentle gaze across the view, small private smile.

scenes.title: Phone — Understanding a German Video
scenes.animation_prompt: Eyes widening slightly. Small smile of recognition. Tiny nod. The moment of understanding spoken German for the first time.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting on his bed in a Kerala bedroom, morning light. He holds his phone, watching something on screen. His expression is one of surprised recognition — he is understanding German being spoken. A small amazed smile forming. White cotton shirt.

scenes.title: Phone — Laughing at Something
scenes.animation_prompt: He laughs — a genuine small laugh at something he understood on the German video. Hand comes up to his mouth briefly. Eyes bright. He understood a joke in German.

scenes.title: Classroom — Answering Confidently
scenes.animation_prompt: Clear confident mouth movement. Steady gaze forward. Small emphatic hand gesture. The voice of someone who knows the answer.
scenes.still_prompt: Medium close-up. A young Malayali man in his early 20s at his desk in a Kerala classroom. He is mid-answer, mouth forming a German sentence, expression focused but confident. No other students visible — tight framing. White cotton shirt.

scenes.title: Completing a Lesson Streak
scenes.animation_prompt: Looking at the streak on the phone with a small proud smile. Setting the phone down gently. Picking up the pen to continue in the notebook. The satisfaction of consistency.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s at a library table, a laptop open showing a German learning app with a completion badge or streak counter. His expression is quietly proud. The notebook beside him has neat German notes. Warm natural light. White cotton shirt.

scenes.title: Helping a Classmate
scenes.animation_prompt: Animated hand pointing at the notebook. Small explanatory gestures. Confident expression. The role reversal of helping someone else.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s standing in a simple Kerala classroom corridor, pointing at something in a notebook held by someone just off-camera. His expression is helpful and confident — explaining a German grammar point. White cotton shirt. Afternoon light.

scenes.title: Evening Terrace — German Podcast
scenes.animation_prompt: Listening with eyes half-closed. Small nod of understanding. Tiny smile at something heard. Sip of tea. The peace of learning through listening.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting on the terrace of his Kerala home in golden evening light. Earphones in, phone in hand — listening to a German podcast or audio lesson. His expression is relaxed and absorbed, understanding naturally. Tea beside him. Kerala rooftops and palms in background. White cotton shirt.

scenes.title: Night — Peaceful Study
scenes.animation_prompt: Steady confident pen strokes. Occasional look at the textbook and back. Small satisfied nod. Calm productive energy.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s at his desk in his Kerala bedroom at night. Warm lamp light. He is studying but the mood is completely different from V4 — calm, productive, in control. Neat notes, organised desk. Small smile. White cotton shirt.

scenes.title: Morning — Looking in the Mirror
scenes.animation_prompt: Steady gaze at his own reflection. Small breath. Tiny nod to himself. Almost imperceptible smile. He sees someone who changed.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s standing in front of a mirror in his Kerala bedroom, morning light. He looks at his reflection with quiet confidence. He is different from the boy who started. No words needed — just a look that says he knows he can do this. White cotton shirt.

videos.title: The Goethe A1 Exam
videos.narrative: Exam day arc: intense preparation, morning of, bus ride, waiting room, exam sections, walking out, getting the result, calling parents.

scenes.title: Outside the Exam Centre
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s standing outside a modest exam centre building in urban Kerala, morning light. He is dressed slightly more formally than usual: same white cotton shirt but tucked in, neater. He holds an ID and a pen, a small bag on his shoulder. His expression is openly nervous but determined — exam day. Hair combed.
scenes.animation_prompt: Nervous breath, small weight shift from foot to foot, tiny glance up at the building, slight tightening of the grip on the ID.

scenes.title: The Written Paper
scenes.still_prompt: Inside a Kerala exam hall, rows of single desks, fluorescent ceiling light, other candidates softly visible at other desks. In the foreground, the young Malayali man sits at his desk, pen in hand on the answer sheet, fully concentrated on the German written exam in front of him. His expression is intense, quietly focused. White cotton shirt tucked in.
scenes.animation_prompt: Small careful pen movements, tiny breath, slight head tilt as he reads a question, focused unblinking gaze.

scenes.title: The Speaking Part
scenes.still_prompt: Inside a small Kerala exam interview room. A calm older examiner sits across a small table, with an exam sheet in front of them. On the near side of the table, the young Malayali man is mid-sentence, speaking German to the examiner. His expression is focused and trying very hard to keep it together — this is the speaking part. Soft natural light from a window.
scenes.animation_prompt: Clear mouth movement of speaking a German sentence, small nervous breath, tiny hand gesture, gaze meeting the examiner.

scenes.title: Walking Out
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man stepping out of a Kerala exam centre building into the afternoon sunlight. He is mid-exhale, the long breath of someone who has just finished a difficult exam. His expression is exhausted but light — it's done, whatever happens now. White cotton shirt.
scenes.animation_prompt: Long slow exhale, gentle drop of the shoulders, tiny smile of relief, slight head tilt up toward the sky.

scenes.title: The Result
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man sitting on the floor of his Kerala home, evening lamp light, holding his phone in both hands. The phone screen shows a Goethe-style A1 result page (no readable text needed, just the visual shape of an official result). His expression is the moment of seeing the pass: eyes wide, breath caught, on the edge of a real smile. Same warm Kerala room as Video 1. White cotton shirt.
scenes.animation_prompt: Sharp small intake of breath, eyes widening, tiny tightening of the grip on the phone, the start of a real smile.

scenes.title: Days Before — Intense Study
scenes.animation_prompt: Quick pen movements. Eyes scanning between textbook and notes. Small mumbled German words. The focused energy of exam preparation.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s at his desk in his Kerala bedroom, a tablet propped up showing German exam prep exercises. Flashcards and practice questions on screen. Notebook with handwritten summaries beside it. Multiple colored pens. Intense concentrated expression. Evening lamp light. White cotton shirt.

scenes.title: Exam Morning — Getting Ready
scenes.animation_prompt: Careful buttoning. Straightening the collar. Small breath in the mirror. Nervous but ready.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s in his Kerala bedroom, morning light. He is buttoning his white cotton shirt carefully, looking in the mirror. His expression is nervous but determined. The German textbook and exam materials are packed in a bag on the bed behind him. Neat hair.

scenes.title: On the Bus to the Exam
scenes.animation_prompt: Eyes darting across the phone screen. Tiny finger taps on flashcard answers. Nervous energy. The focus of last-minute app revision.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s on a Kerala bus, morning. He holds his phone, doing last-minute vocabulary revision on the German app. Earphones in. His expression is nervous but focused. White cotton shirt tucked in.

scenes.title: Waiting Room
scenes.animation_prompt: Small nervous weight shift. Hands clasping and unclasping. Glance at the clock. Deep breath. The tension of waiting.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting in a simple waiting room with plastic chairs. He sits alone, hands clasped, waiting to be called in. His expression is tense and focused. A clock on the wall. Simple institutional room. White cotton shirt tucked in.

scenes.title: Celebration — Fist Pump
scenes.animation_prompt: Fist pump. Big genuine smile breaking across his face. Eyes bright with joy. Small jump or weight shift of celebration. Pure relief.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s standing outside a Kerala building in afternoon light. He has just seen his result on his phone — a contained but real celebration. One fist pumping subtly, a big genuine smile, eyes bright. White cotton shirt. The relief and joy of passing.

scenes.title: Celebration — Calling Home
scenes.animation_prompt: He immediately puts the phone to his ear, calling someone. Excited expression. Mouth forming words rapidly — telling someone the news. Walking in circles with happy energy.

scenes.title: Night — The Certificate on the Desk
scenes.animation_prompt: Gentle lamp flicker. Tiny shadow shift. Stillness. The quiet dignity of an achievement resting on a desk.
scenes.still_prompt: Close-up of a desk in a Kerala bedroom at night, warm lamp light. A Goethe-Institut A1 certificate (simple official-looking document, no readable text needed) lies on the desk next to the German textbook, notebook, and pen that started it all. A steel cup of chai beside them. No person visible — just the objects that represent the journey. Warm intimate lighting.

videos.title: Landing in Germany
videos.narrative: First moments in Germany. Airport, train, first glimpse of a German city, finding the dorm, first night alone. Everything is new, cold, and overwhelming.

scenes.title: German Airport — Arrivals
scenes.animation_prompt: Steady walking, pulling suitcase. Head turning to take in the unfamiliar space. Wide eyes. The disorientation of arrival.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s walking through a modern German airport arrivals hall, pulling a large suitcase. Bright fluorescent lights, German signage softly visible. He wears a warm jacket over his white shirt — first time in winter clothing. His expression is overwhelmed and alert. Other travelers around him in soft blur.

scenes.title: Airport — Standing Still
scenes.animation_prompt: He stops walking and stands still for a moment in the airport hall. People flow around him. He takes a breath, looks around, processes. The smallness of being new in a huge foreign place.

scenes.title: German Train — Window
scenes.animation_prompt: Eyes following the landscape. Gentle train vibration. Gray sky and bare trees reflected in the window. Breath fogs the cold glass slightly.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s sitting on a German regional train, looking out the window. Winter European landscape rolling past — bare trees, gray sky, small towns. His expression is a mix of wonder and loneliness. Warm jacket. Suitcase in the luggage rack. Clean modern train interior.

scenes.title: German City Street — First Steps
scenes.animation_prompt: Walking slowly, head turning. Tiny shiver. Eyes wide at the unfamiliar architecture. Snowflakes catching the light. Steps on European cobblestones.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s walking on a German city street in winter, pulling his suitcase. European architecture, tram tracks, gray sky. A few snowflakes in the air. He is looking around at everything — street signs, buildings, people in winter coats. Warm jacket. The wonder and cold of a first walk in Europe.

scenes.title: Finding the Building
scenes.animation_prompt: Looking up at the building. Glancing at the paper. Small breath. Reaching for the door buzzer. The threshold of his new life.
scenes.still_prompt: A young Malayali man in his early 20s standing outside a German apartment building or student dormitory, looking up at it. Winter afternoon light.
